name: Armlet of Mordiggian
description: Weapon of choice among brutes, the bearer sacrifices his life energy to gain immense strength and power.

abilities.name: Unholy Strength
abilities.description: The strength also increases the wielder's current health by 22 per point. This is not considered a heal. Cooldown: 0. Mana Cost: 0. Strength Bonus: 25. Attack Damage Bonus: 35. Armor Bonus: 4. Drains 45 health in 0.11-second intervals while active.
